summary: Iteration 16 - Testing 3 new features: Aureos Token System, Weekly Challenge, Price Validation. Backend: 20/20 tests passed (100%). All token APIs working: balance, earning rules (16), store (8 items), spend, earn, daily-login, history. Weekly challenge with registration and leaderboard. Price validation correctly normalizes Gold/XAU prices from Twelve Data.
passed_tests: GET /api/tokens/balance - returns balance (58 AT), total_earned, total_spent, recent_transactions
GET /api/tokens/balance - unauthorized returns 401
GET /api/tokens/earning-rules - returns 16 rules with correct token amounts (trade_close=5, trade_win=10, trade_big_win=25, daily_login=3)
GET /api/tokens/store - returns 8 items with can_afford flag based on user balance
GET /api/tokens/store - unauthorized returns 401
POST /api/tokens/daily-login - returns 'already claimed today' message (correctly prevents double claim)
POST /api/tokens/daily-login - unauthorized returns 401
POST /api/tokens/earn - grants tokens for valid reason (first_analysis +10 AT)
POST /api/tokens/earn - supports custom amount override
POST /api/tokens/earn - invalid reason returns 400
POST /api/tokens/spend - insufficient balance returns 400 with clear error message
POST /api/tokens/spend - invalid item returns 404
POST /api/tokens/spend - successful purchase deducts tokens and records transaction
GET /api/tokens/history - returns full transaction history with types (earn/spend)
GET /api/tokens/weekly-challenge - returns week_id, leaderboard, prizes (1st=500AT, 2nd=300AT, 3rd=200AT), my_entry
POST /api/tokens/weekly-challenge/register - returns success (already registered message)
POST /api/tokens/weekly-challenge/register - unauthorized returns 401
GET /api/intelligence/market-pulse - returns validated prices (Gold $2505, BTC $73924, EUR/USD 1.15)
Price validation - all assets within expected ranges (no abnormal prices)
Paper trading token integration - closing trade grants tokens (trade_close+trade_win+trade_big_win)
critical_code_review_comments: Token system correctly integrates with paper trading - closing trades grants tokens based on outcome (5 base + 10 win + 25 big_win)
Daily login bonus has streak tracking with bonuses at 7-day (+25) and 30-day (+100) streaks
Price validation layer (PRICE_REFERENCE dict) ensures Gold stays in 1800-4000 range, auto-corrects Twelve Data anomalies
TD_NORMALIZATION specifically handles Twelve Data XAU/USD scaling issues (divides by 0.5 if price > 4500)
Weekly challenge correctly tracks score_delta from registration point to current score
Store has 8 items across 4 categories (signals, insights, subscription, cosmetic) with proper can_afford calculation
seed_data_creation: Test user has 58 AT balance (earned from paper trades + daily login), 9 transactions in history, registered for week 2026-W11 challenge
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 16 tested 3 new features: (1) Aureos Token System with 10 endpoints under /api/tokens/* - balance, earning-rules (16 rules), store (8 items), spend, earn, history, daily-login, weekly-challenge, weekly-challenge/register. (2) Weekly Score Challenge with leaderboard tracking score_delta from registration. (3) Price validation layer in market_data.py with PRICE_REFERENCE ranges and TD_NORMALIZATION for Twelve Data fixes. Test user (test@test.com/test) has 58 AT balance, 9 transactions, registered for week 2026-W11. Token integration with paper trading confirmed working - closing trades grants tokens. All APIs return proper error codes (401 unauthorized, 400 insufficient balance, 404 not found).

mocked_components.note: No mocked APIs - all integrations are real
real_integrations: Price data from Twelve Data API with validation/normalization
Price data from CoinGecko for crypto
Paper trading token grant integration via grant_tokens() helper

rca_of_the_issue: N/A - No issues found. All 3 new features (Aureos Tokens, Weekly Challenge, Price Validation) working correctly.
